Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY, LTD'S Motion To Seal Records.

Defendant Sentinel Insurance Company, Ltd.'s motion to seal records is granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Defendant submits a proposed order by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Ruth Ekhaus, CSR#12219, rekhaus@sftc.org, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
